mapper.sql: select id, guid, scada_data, serial_numbers, device_name, is_main_page, page_name, page_resolution, is_share, share_url, share_pass, page_image, tenant_id, tenant_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag, type, share_short_url from scada
mapper.select: select status from iot_device where serial_number = #{serialNumber} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.sql: select d.device_id, d.device_name, d.product_id, p.product_name, d.tenant_id, d.tenant_name, d.serial_number,d.gw_dev_code, d.firmware_version, d.status, d.rssi,is_shadow ,d.location_way,d.things_model_value,d.network_address, d.network_ip, d.longitude, d.latitude, d.active_time, d.create_time, d.update_time, d.img_url,d.summary,d.remark from iot_device d left join iot_product p on d.product_id = p.product_id
mapper.select: select user_id from sys_user where dept_id = #{deptId} and status = 0 and del_flag = 0
select guid from scene_model where scene_model_id = #{sceneModelId} and del_flag = 0
select product_id from iot_product where guid = #{guid} and del_flag = '0'
select scene_model_id from scene_model where guid = #{guid} and del_flag = 0
select product_id, product_name from iot_product where product_id = #{productId} and del_flag = '0'

select s.scene_model_id, smd.name device_name, smd.variable_type, smd.id scene_model_device_id, d.device_id, d.product_id, d.serial_number from scene_model s left join scene_model_device smd on s.scene_model_id = smd.scene_model_id left join iot_device d on smd.cus_device_id = d.device_id and d.del_flag = '0' where s.guid = #{guid} and s.del_flag = 0 and smd.del_flag = 0
select password from sys_user where user_id = #{userId} and del_flag = 0
mapper.delete:
delete from scada where id in
#{id}
mapper.update:
update scene_model set guid = null where guid in
#{guid}

update iot_product set guid = null where guid in
#{guid}
